base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_stage_flag_emblem — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Stage-flag emblems shown at bottom-right HUD — 1 / 5 / 10 / 20 / 30 / 50 stage emblems. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage-flag emblems shown at bottom-right HUD — 1 / 5 / 10 / 20 / 30 / 50 stage emblems; sum tracks current stage number (e.g. stage 13 = 10 + 1 + 1 + 1 flags)
